section.title: Value Delivery and Attitudes
section.description: This section asks how AI may have contributed to delivering value in your projects.

questions.text: In which of the following areas has AI use helped improve your project management outcomes? (Select all that apply)

options.label: Decision-Making – AI has helped me make more informed or faster project decisions
Stakeholder Alignment & Communication – AI has improved stakeholder understanding, engagement, or communication
Team Productivity – AI has enhanced team collaboration or productivity
Project Delivery Speed/Efficiency – AI has accelerated delivery timelines or improved workflow efficiency
Deliverable Quality/Value – AI has contributed to higher quality outputs or added value to project deliverables
None of the above – AI has not notably improved any of these aspects in my projects

questions.text: Please rate your agreement with each statement below, where 1 = Strongly Disagree and 5 = Strongly Agree:

rows.label: I am satisfied with the AI tools I have used in my project management work
AI tools have been effective in supporting my project management tasks and improving project outcomes
I feel confident using AI tools in my role as a project management professional
The benefits of using AI outweigh the potential drawbacks or risks
